title: Dashboard
description: The Dashboard provides a centralized overview of your Parthenon environment, surfacing key metrics, recent activity, and quick navigation to core platform features. It serves as the primary landing experience for researchers and administrators upon logging in.
tips: Use the Dashboard to quickly resume recent cohort definitions, analyses, or concept sets without navigating through individual sections.
Monitor summary metrics on the Dashboard to stay informed about data source status and analysis completion.
Bookmark the Dashboard URL as your default entry point for efficient daily research workflows.
Administrators can use the Dashboard to get a high-level view of platform activity before drilling into the Administration section.
